message.content:
@startuml
participant "GameController" as GC1 #D3D8E7#000000<<Rectangle>> { }
actor Player <<Actor>> 
database Die <<Database>> 

GC1 ->+ GC1 : 1 Start\nCreate Game Instance
activate GC1

Player <-right- GC1 : 2 Create New Player Object
Die --up--> Player : 3 Initialize Dice for Rolling

loop [While Money < $3000]
    note over Player,DIE: Roll dice until target reached
    
    rect rgb(245, 246, 249)
        activate DIE
        
        alt Success Condition Met?
            right to left arrowover
            
            else Failure Case Handling
                
                loop Retry Attempts Remaining > 0
                    
                    if Check Valid Move Then
                        
                        up down double linearrow
                        
                        
                        


else Endgame Reached



@enduml
